Development and maintenance of web applications with Laravel, Livewire, Astro, WordPress, Joomla, Yii2, and plain PHP.
Implementation of an AI chat bot and a payment gateway in BigCommerce.
Analysis, debugging, and optimization of code in existing systems; server and hosting administration (cPanel); production technical support.
